---
title: "Programa de Prevención y Control de Arbovirosis | 2026 | Tijuana"
format: 
  dashboard:
    nav-buttons: [twitter, github, facebook]
    logo: https://framework-gb.cdn.gob.mx/gobmx/img/logo_blanco.svg
theme: custom.scss
---

# [**Cadenas de Transmisión**]{style="font-size:2pt"}

::: panel-tabset

### [**Tijuana**]{style="color:#990000"}

```{=html}
<style>
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Contenedor principal con scroll - tres COLUMNAS */
.responsive-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;  /* Tres COLUMNAS iguales */
  gap: 25px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  max-height: 85vh;          /* Altura máxima para scroll */
  overflow-y: auto;          /* Scroll vertical */
  padding: 15px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #fafafa;
  align-items: start;
}

/* Cada columna es un contenedor flexible que apila sus elementos */
.columna {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

/* Título de columna */
.column-header {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 8px;
  background-color: #772953;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Estilo para cada tarjeta de mapa */
.grid-card {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: white;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.grid-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

/* Asegura que los mapas tengan tamaño consistente */
.grid-card .html-widget,
.grid-card iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 400px !important;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* Responsive: en móviles, una sola columna */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .responsive-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;  /* Una columna en móvil */
    max-height: 70vh;
    gap: 15px;
    padding: 10px;
  }
  .column-header {
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .grid-card .html-widget,
  .grid-card iframe {
    height: 300px !important;
  }
}
</style>
```
::::::::::::::::::::: responsive-grid

<!-- COLUMNA 1: Distribución de Casos --><div class="columna"><div class="column-header"> 📊 DISTRIBUCIÓN DE CASOS POR SEMANA EPIDEMIOLÓGICA </div><!--

<!-- MAPA 3 (Fila 1, columna 1 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2023-2025
```{r casos_2023_2025, echo=FALSE}
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_transmission_chains.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_dengue_cases.R")
library(mapgl)
library(fishualize)
library(sf)
mp_dengue_cases(data = xy,
                yrs = c(2023:2025),
                locality = "Tijuana",
                cve_edo = "02")
```
:::


<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2025
```{r casos_2025,echo=FALSE}
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_transmission_chains.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_dengue_cases.R")
library(mapgl)
library(fishualize)
library(sf)
mp_dengue_cases(data = xy,
                yrs = c(2025),
                locality = "Tijuana",
                cve_edo = "02")
```

:::

<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2024
```{r casos_2024, echo=FALSE}
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_transmission_chains.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_dengue_cases.R")
library(mapgl)
library(fishualize)
library(sf)
mp_dengue_cases(data = xy,
                yrs = 2024,
                locality = "Tijuana",
                cve_edo = "02")
```

:::


<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2023
```{r casos_2023,echo=FALSE}
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_transmission_chains.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_dengue_cases.R")
library(mapgl)
library(fishualize)
library(sf)
mp_dengue_cases(data = xy,
                yrs = 2023,
                locality = "Tijuana",
                cve_edo = "02")
```

:::

<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2016-2022
```{r casos_2016_2022,echo=FALSE}
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_transmission_chains.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_dengue_cases.R")
library(mapgl)
library(fishualize)
library(sf)
mp_dengue_cases(data = xy,
                yrs = c(2026:2022),
                locality = "Tijuana",
                cve_edo = "02")
```

:::



</div><!-- COLUMNA 2: Cadenas de Transmisión --><div class="columna"><div class="column-header"> 🔄 MAPAS DE CALOR </div>

<!-- MAPA 3 (Fila 1, columna 1 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2023-2025
```{r heatmap_2023_2025, echo=FALSE}
# Step 1. load the dataset ####
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")

# Step 2. load the function ####
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_heatmap.R")
library(sf)
library(mapgl)
mp_heatmap(geocoded_dataset = xy,
           yrs = c(2023:2025),
           cve_edo = "02",
           locality = "Tijuana")
```
:::


<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2025
```{r heatmap_2025,echo=FALSE}
# Step 1. load the dataset ####
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")

# Step 2. load the function ####
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_heatmap.R")
library(sf)
library(mapgl)
mp_heatmap(geocoded_dataset = xy,
           yrs = 2025,
           cve_edo = "02",
           locality = "Tijuana")
```

:::

<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2024
```{r heatmap_2024,echo=FALSE}
# Step 1. load the dataset ####
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")

# Step 2. load the function ####
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_heatmap.R")
library(sf)
library(mapgl)
mp_heatmap(geocoded_dataset = xy,
           yrs = 2024,
           cve_edo = "02",
           locality = "Tijuana")
```

:::


<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2023
```{r heatmap_2023,echo=FALSE}
# Step 1. load the dataset ####
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")

# Step 2. load the function ####
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_heatmap.R")
library(sf)
library(mapgl)
mp_heatmap(geocoded_dataset = xy,
           yrs = 2023,
           cve_edo = "02",
           locality = "Tijuana")
```

:::

<!-- MAPA 4 (Fila 2, col = 2 - Casos) -->
::: grid-card
2016-2022
```{r heatmap_2016_2022,echo=FALSE}
# Step 1. load the dataset ####
load("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/hotspots_2025/8.RData/denmex_chains.RData")

# Step 2. load the function ####
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_02_baja_california/mp_heatmap.R")
library(sf)
library(mapgl)
mp_heatmap(geocoded_dataset = xy,
           yrs = c(2026:2022),
           cve_edo = "02",
           locality = "Tijuana")
```
:::



</div>
:::::::::::::::::::::

:::
